name: simple-i18n-checker
description: Keep TSX translation calls and public locale JSON dictionaries in sync with missing-key diagnostics, unused-key cleanup, and definition jumps.

scripts.start: echo "Press F5 in VS Code to run the extension"

simpleI18nChecker.defaultLocale.description: Default locale folder used when navigating from TSX translation keys to JSON dictionaries.

simpleI18nChecker.dictionaryPublicPaths.description: Optional public directory paths to scan for locale dictionaries, relative to the workspace root or absolute. The extension also auto-discovers public folders such as frontend/public.
